case_title: ERIC SAGE VS. CARLOS MORALES ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WERE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---SHANNON RAINTREE. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JUN-01-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, CARLOS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY SAGE, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, CARLOS MORALES, SANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
